text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Hey, good talk at the dorm leader meeting
today, Hishiama! Now then...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Three, two, one and... zero. It's now officially
after curfew!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
A'ight, let's catch ourselves a good haul of
stragglers today!

text_block_list.name: Rito Dorm Residents
text_block_list.text: Huff, puff! F-Fuji! Sorry we're late!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Curfew was twenty minutes ago. Did something
happen to keep you all out?

text_block_list.name: Rito Dorm Residents
text_block_list.text:
W-well, no... We just got caught up while chatting
and lost track of time. We're really sorry!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I appreciate your honesty. It's fine to enjoy
company with friends, but be more careful next
time.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
When I think of all you darling ponies wandering
about so late at night, why, I find myself simply
overcome with distress!

text_block_list.name: Rito Dorm Residents
text_block_list.text: Gasp! Okay! We'll be better next time, promise!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Ugh. I'm not sure if I'd call that a slap on the wrist
or a kiss on the cheek. They aren't gonna learn if
you don't scare 'em good.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha! Your no-nonsense approach certainly
keeps your residents in line, that's for sure!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
But the moment I saw them running up, breathless
with apology, I knew they were sincerely sorry.

text_block_list.name: Rito Dorm Delinquent
text_block_list.text:
There you are! Yo, Fuji! What the hell's with this
thing?!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: What the... What is that? Hang on, is that a plush of you, Fuji?

text_block_list.name: Rito Dorm Delinquent
text_block_list.text:
The minute it hit eight o'clock, it started blasting
out these super cringe lines, and I couldn't turn it
off!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Plush
text_block_list.text:
"Oh, my darling, are you not home yet? Hurry
back! I miss you so, my sweet pony!"

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Hahaha! Don't tell me you don't like my little gift!

text_block_list.name: Rito Dorm Delinquent
text_block_list.text: When did you even put this in my bag?! Ugh, I get it already! I'll stop breaking curfew, all right?!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
That's the weirdest disciplinary method I've ever
seen, but eh... Suits you.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Well, being able to provide exactly what is
needed is the noble work of an entertainer, after
all! ♪

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Oops, it's nearly nine. We should head back soon
too.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Oh... Brian! Just what time do you think it is right
now?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...Dunno. Wasn't paying attention.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: I wish you would, though. It's not hard to—

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Whatever. I'm going to sleep. Bye.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Wait, Brian! I'm not do—hmmm...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: ...So that's what happened last night.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Brian is such a tough nut to crack. I don't know
what to do with her.
choice_data_list:
You might have to switch up the way you talk to
her.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: But how? What do you think would work?
choice_data_list: You have to be fierce like Hishi Amazon!
You have to be strict like Air Groove!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I think I know what you mean! Heheh, that might
actually work. I'll give it a shot!

The next night, Narita Brian once again returns
past curfew.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon(?)
text_block_list.text:
You there! Brian! And just what time do ya think it
is right now?!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Ama?!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...Wait, it's just you! Stop messing with me!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Get back here! I let it slide last time, but you're
not gettin' away this time.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
If you aren't gonna listen to me, then let's settle
things with a one-on-one race!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Ugh, quit it with your stupid impersonation! Ama's
not even like that! She's more—

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...Sigh. Never mind. I don't have the energy for this...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
I'll be more careful about curfew, all right? You
happy?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Oh! That really worked! ♪

Fuji Kiseki manages to maintain her dignity as
dorm leader and add a new personality to her
repertoire of characters.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
She does get pretty intense when she chides us
during student council meetings... I'll give it a try!
Playing the Empress should be good practice!

The next night, Narita Brian once again returns
past curfew.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove(?)
text_block_list.text:
You! Just what do you think you're doing still
out? Do you have any idea what time it is?!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Ack, Air Groove?!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Huh, it's just Fuji Kiseki... Wait, Fuji Kiseki?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Don't you dare run. Upon my pride as Empress, I'll
drill into your head the vital importance of
punctuality!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Ngh... What is this pressure I'm feeling?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
...Argh, enough already! This is more trouble than
it's worth!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Look, I'll be more careful about curfew, so get off
my back already.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Oh! That really worked! ♪

Fuji Kiseki manages to maintain her dignity as
dorm leader and add a new personality to her
repertoire of characters.
